query:
SELECT 
  d.id as departamentoId, 
  d.nome as departamentoNome, 
  d.leaderId,
  u.name as liderNome,
  u.departamentoId as liderDepartamentoId
FROM departamentos d
LEFT JOIN users u ON d.leaderId = u.id
WHERE d.leaderId IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 20;
